quote: Since joining Anointed Word Ministries, my faith has been strengthened in ways I never imagined. The teaching of the Word is powerful and life-changing.
name: Sister Michelle

quote: The prayer ministry at AWM has truly transformed my prayer life. I've experienced breakthrough after breakthrough through the power of intercession.
name: Brother James

quote: Apostle Cofield's leadership and love for God's people is evident in everything she does. This ministry is a true family where everyone is welcome.
name: Sister Patricia

quote: The Women's Ministry has been such a blessing. It's a safe space where we grow together in faith, support one another, and worship freely.
name: Sister Andrea
